raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2023 there was a charge made to my citicard credit card for {$63.00} fraudulently.Citicard has refused to fix this. I WANT PROOF THAT I MADE THIS CHARGE. Citicard wants me to bend over backwards and do all the work, I have filed reports with my local police dept, RI attorney general, CFPD, FTC, all 3 of my credit bureaus, and reached out to an attorney. Citcard continued to charge me late fees while being disputed and reported that i was merely being delinquent in payment. It dropped my score XXXX point and continues to affect my score negatively and impacting my natural order of impeccable credit that i worked 27 years to establish. i finally paid the fraud charge in order to stop the process and take legal action the right way. Again, i demand the proof that i made a subscription charge to XXXX on XX/XX/203. 

XXXX Police report filed XXXX dispute filed and fraud alert placed on credit CFPD complaint XXXX # XXXX Report fraud FTC Report XXXX : XXXX Consultation with XXXX XXXX
